headline: **MLB Daily Recap: April 30, 2026**
article:
The Detroit Tigers secured a 5-2 victory over the Atlanta Braves, with Drew Anderson earning the win. Framber Valdez led the Tigers' pitching effort, striking out eight batters in six innings. The Houston Astros bounced back from a blowout loss to the Orioles with an 11-5 victory, led by Cam Smith's strong performance.

Several key players have been affected by injuries, impacting their teams' lineups. Brandon Woodruff has been placed on the 15-day injured list due to right shoulder inflammation with the Milwaukee Brewers. Other notable injuries include Kyle Backhus (Philadelphia Phillies), Luis Robert Jr. (New York Mets), Brandon Williamson (Cincinnati Reds), Javier Báez (Detroit Tigers), Casey Mize (Detroit Tigers), Angel Zerpa (Milwaukee Brewers), and Jared Oliva (San Francisco Giants).

The Detroit Tigers bolstered their roster with the addition of infielder Zack Short, acquired from the Washington Nationals in exchange for cash. Other notable roster moves include the Los Angeles Dodgers acquiring Tyler Fitzgerald from the Toronto Blue Jays for cash, and the Toronto Blue Jays acquiring Willie MacIver from the Texas Rangers for cash.

top_news.title: **Tigers Take Down Braves 5-2**
top_news.summary: The Detroit Tigers secured a 5-2 victory over the Atlanta Braves, with Drew Anderson earning the win. Framber Valdez led the Tigers' pitching effort, striking out eight batters in six innings.

top_news.title: **Astros Fall to Orioles in Blowout**
top_news.summary: The Baltimore Orioles dominated the Houston Astros 10-3, handing them a decisive loss. Jeremiah Jackson led the Orioles' offense with 2 hits, 1 home run, and 5 RBIs.

top_news.title: **Astros Take Down Orioles 11-5**
top_news.summary: The Houston Astros secured a convincing 11-5 victory over the Baltimore Orioles, with Cam Smith leading the Astros' offense. Lance McCullers Jr. earned the win with 6 strong innings, striking out 9 and allowing 3 earned runs.

top_news.title: Cardinals Cruise Past Pirates 10-5
top_news.summary: The St. Louis Cardinals secured a decisive 10-5 victory over the Pittsburgh Pirates, behind a strong performance from their offense. Jordan Walker led the charge with 2 hits, 1 home run, and 3 RBIs.

top_news.title: **Woodruff Lands on Injured List**
top_news.summary: Milwaukee Brewers right-hander Brandon Woodruff has been placed on the 15-day injured list due to right shoulder inflammation.

top_news.title: **Tigers Acquire Zack Short in Trade**
top_news.summary: The Detroit Tigers have bolstered their roster with the addition of infielder Zack Short, acquired from the Washington Nationals in exchange for cash.
